description_long: This is a large, industrial-style dumpster with a domed, hinged lid and a rectangular slot for depositing waste. The exterior is predominantly a weathered yellow color, with extensive patches of rust and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The dumpster sits on four visible caster wheels, allowing for mobility, and features a sturdy metal handle on each side for maneuvering. The lid appears to be made of the same metal as the body, with a slightly lighter, worn finish and no visible locking mechanism. The overall construction is robust, with thick metal panels and reinforced edges. There are no visible warning labels or signage on the exterior.
description: A large, weathered yellow metal dumpster with a domed, hinged lid, rust patches, side handles, and caster wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular deposit slot on the domed lid and two front caster wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the metal handle and the domed lid's curvature, with visible rust patches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, rusted metal panel and the back caster wheels, with no slot or handles visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite handle and the domed lid, similar to the left side.
attribute_lid_type: domed, single-section, hinged metal lid with a rectangular deposit slot; no visible locking mechanism
attribute_handle_design: two bar-shaped metal handles, one on each side near the top edge
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area or residential alley
